Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the whiteboard used by the sports clubs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Game formations and strategies for[n]tournaments are written on it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The kendo and swim teams seem to[n]be doing quite well at competitions...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the whiteboard used by the sports clubs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Game formations and strategies for[n]tournaments are written on it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lately, the track team has been getting results[n]as good as the kendo team and swim team...[n]{f 1 1}
